channel.title: Veille métier du 2026-07-10
channel.description: Veille quotidienne assurance, finance, banque et régulation.

item.title: ​The EBA releases the final technical package for its 4.3 reporting framework to support Third-Country Branches reporting and AML Authority risk assessment data collection
item.description: ​The European Banking Authority (EBA) today published the final technical package for version 4.3 of its reporting framework. The package implements the new reporting requirements for Third-Country Branches (TCBs) under the Capital Requirements Directive (CRD) and supports the implementation of a risk assessment data collection exercise by the Anti-Money Laundering Authority (AMLA). ​ — Thématique réglementation ; source jugée fiable (european banking authority) ; impact réglementaire.

item.title: ESMA publishes first market capitalisation data for EU Member States 10/07/2026 The European Securities and Markets Authority (ESMA), the EU’s financial markets regulator
item.description: The European Securities and Markets Authority (ESMA), the EU’s financial markets regulator — Thématique finance ; source jugée fiable (esma news) ; impact marché.

item.title: EU and South Africa kick off intergovernmental dialogue on Clean Trade and Investment Partnership
item.description: Today, the EU and the South Africa are holding the first government-to-government dialogue at senior-official level to advance on the implementation of their Clean Trade and Investment Partnership (CTIP). — Thématique géopolitique ; source jugée fiable (european commission - eu trade news) ; impact énergie / commerce.

item.title: UV Assurance dévoile l’identité de son nouveau PDG - Finance et Investissement

item.title: Commission imposes anti-dumping duties on passenger car and light lorry tyres from China
item.description: On 7 July 2026, the Commission published a regulation imposing definitive anti-dumping duties on imports of passenger-car and light-lorry tyres originating in the People’s Republic of China. — Thématique réglementation ; source jugée fiable (european commission - eu trade news) ; impact réglementaire.
